PackList.title: Streamer
positive_prompts:
Create a high-quality cartoon caricature illustration based on the input photo.

STRICT IDENTITY PRESERVATION:
- Keep the same facial structure, eye shape, nose, lips, jawline, skin tone, hairstyle, and hair color as the input photo
- The person must be immediately recognizable as the same individual
- Do NOT change gender, ethnicity, or age

FACIAL EXPRESSION:
- Make the expression playful, cheerful, slightly mischievous
- Bright eyes, cheeky smile, fun vibe
- Slight caricature exaggeration but keep likeness accurate

STYLE:
- Cartoon / caricature illustration, clean smooth line art
- Soft shading, vibrant colors, semi-3D polished digital illustration
- High detail, professional, not childish

POSE & COMPOSITION:
- Person sitting at a streamer desk, upper body visible, facing camera
- Hands on desk near keyboard/mouse or holding a controller
- Natural confident posture

STREAMER DESK & PROPS (add many streamer-related objects):
- Large microphone on boom arm with pop filter
- Audio interface / mixer (e.g., stream deck / soundboard)
- Dual monitors showing OBS-like streaming layout (chat window + live preview)
- RGB mechanical keyboard, gaming mouse, mousepad
- Ring light / softbox light, small camera/webcam on tripod
- Headphones on stand, gaming controller
- Streaming signboards: "LIVE", "ON AIR", subscriber counter
- Neon LED strips, colorful ambient lighting
- Shelves with awards/trophies, creator plaques, figurines
- Chat bubbles / notification overlays as subtle UI elements
- Sticky notes with content ideas, schedule planner, script pages
- Snack props: energy drink, coffee cup, chips, seltzer can
- Tech clutter: cables, SD cards, lens cap, portable SSD
- Optional: green screen folded in the corner

BACKGROUND:
- Cozy home studio / streamer room
- Posters, LED panels, wall foam acoustic panels
- Depth of field, background slightly blurred but objects still readable

LIGHTING:
- Soft studio light on face, warm highlights, clean contrast
- Slight rim light from LED strips

QUALITY:
- Ultra high resolution, sharp, clean details, no artifacts

9:16 vertical.
PackList.negative_prompt: photorealistic, realistic photo, anime, low quality, blurry, flat colors, identity loss, wrong face, different person, over-deformed face, ugly caricature, bad anatomy, extra fingers, extra arms, messy composition, clutter covering face, text watermark, logo, low detail

PackList.title: Developer
positive_prompts:
Create a high-quality cartoon caricature illustration based on the input photo, in the same artistic style as a playful, detailed cartoon developer illustration.

STRICT IDENTITY PRESERVATION:
- Keep the same facial structure, face shape, eyes, nose, mouth, beard/glasses (if any), skin tone, hairstyle and hair color from the input photo
- The person must be instantly recognizable as the same individual
- Do NOT change gender, ethnicity, or age

FACIAL STYLE & EXPRESSION:
- Big-head cartoon caricature style
- Cheerful, confident, nerdy-fun smile
- Slightly exaggerated facial features but accurate likeness
- Friendly, intelligent, tech-savvy vibe

ART STYLE:
- Cartoon caricature illustration
- Bold clean outlines
- Rich colors, soft gradients
- Semi-3D, hand-painted digital illustration look
- Highly detailed, polished, professional
- Similar style to popular cartoon tech character illustrations

POSE & COMPOSITION:
- The person is sitting at a developer desk
- Upper body visible, facing the camera
- One hand on keyboard or mouse, the other holding a small tech object (chip, robot, dice, gadget)

DEVELOPER WORKSPACE (IMPORTANT – many tech objects):
- Laptop open with visible code editor on screen (syntax-highlighted code)
- External monitor showing code, terminal, or system dashboard
- Mechanical keyboard, gaming mouse
- Headphones resting around neck or on desk
- Small cute robot assistant next to the laptop
- Mini drone, AI robot, or futuristic gadget on desk
- Coffee mug with tech joke text
- Sticky notes with programming ideas or TODOs
- Books about programming, AI, or software engineering
- Desk lamp with warm light
- Optional: smartwatch, USB drives, cables, circuit boards

BACKGROUND:
- Developer / tech studio room
- Futuristic or geeky atmosphere
- Floating hologram-style icons (code symbols, AI diagrams, circuits)
- Sci-fi posters, robots, rockets, abstract tech art
- City skyline or space-themed elements in cartoon style
- Depth of field, background slightly blurred but readable

LIGHTING:
- Warm key light on face
- Cool accent lighting from monitors
- Balanced contrast, cinematic cartoon lighting

QUALITY:
- Ultra high resolution
- Sharp details
- Clean illustration
- No noise, no artifacts

9:16 vertical.

PackList.title: Chef
positive_prompts:
Create a high-quality cartoon caricature illustration based on the input photo, in the same artistic style as a professional, playful cartoon chef illustration.

STRICT IDENTITY PRESERVATION:
- Keep the same facial structure, face shape, eyes, nose, lips, skin tone, hairstyle, and facial hair (if any) from the input photo
- The person must be instantly recognizable as the same individual
- Do NOT change gender, ethnicity, or age

FACIAL STYLE & EXPRESSION:
- Big-head cartoon caricature style
- Very bright, joyful facial expression
- Big genuine smile showing teeth OR playful wink (one eye closed)
- Cheerful, confident, friendly chef vibe
- Slightly exaggerated cheeks and eyes to enhance happiness
- Expressive eyebrows and lively eyes
- Fun, charming, approachable personality
- Subtle caricature exaggeration while keeping accurate facial likeness

ART STYLE:
- Cartoon caricature illustration
- Clean bold outlines
- Rich warm colors, soft gradients
- Semi-3D digital illustration
- Highly detailed, polished, professional
- Cozy, premium bakery / culinary illustration vibe

POSE & COMPOSITION:
- The person is standing behind a kitchen or bakery counter
- Upper body visible, facing the camera
- One hand holding piping bag
- The other hand presenting a cake, cupcakes, or dessert tray

CHEF / BAKERY OUTFIT:
- Chef uniform or baker outfit
- Dark or white chef jacket
- Apron
- Chef hat or baker cap
- Optional gloves for pastry work

KITCHEN & BAKERY PROPS (IMPORTANT – rich background objects):
- Decorated cake on a cake stand
- Cupcakes with cream and flowers
- Baking tools: piping bags, spatula, whisk, rolling pin
- Bowls with cream, chocolate, berries
- Jars of ingredients (sugar, flour, sprinkles)
- Recipe notebook or menu card on the counter
- Oven or bakery shelves in the background
- Cake boxes, baking trays, molds
- Decorative elements: flowers, ribbons, dessert toppers

BACKGROUND:
- Cozy bakery or professional kitchen interior
- Warm lighting, elegant pastry shop vibe
- Shelves filled with cakes, pastries, jars, baking tools
- Soft bokeh lights or fairy lights
- Background slightly blurred but objects still readable

LIGHTING:
- Warm, soft studio lighting
- Gentle highlights on face and desserts
- Inviting, delicious atmosphere

QUALITY:
- Ultra high resolution
- Sharp details
- Clean illustration
- No noise, no artifacts

9:16 vertical.

PackList.title: Farmer
positive_prompts:
Create a highly stylized CARTOON caricature illustration based on the input photo, with a strong, obvious cartoon illustration look (NOT realistic).

STRICT IDENTITY PRESERVATION:
- Keep the same facial structure, face shape, eyes, nose, lips, skin tone, hairstyle, and facial hair (if any)
- The person must be instantly recognizable as the same individual
- Do NOT change gender, ethnicity, or age

FACIAL STYLE & EXPRESSION:
- Strong big-head cartoon caricature style
- Large expressive eyes, rounded cheeks
- Very bright joyful smile OR playful wink
- Friendly, wholesome, cheerful farmer expression
- Slight exaggeration of facial proportions while preserving likeness

ART STYLE (VERY IMPORTANT – CARTOON EMPHASIS):
- Pure cartoon illustration, not photorealistic
- Thick, clean, bold outlines
- Simplified shapes, rounded forms
- Vibrant, saturated colors
- Soft painterly shading, no realistic textures
- Semi-3D cartoon look similar to professional storybook or Pixar-like illustration
- Cute, charming, wholesome, family-friendly style

POSE & HANDS:
- The person is standing or sitting near a farm table or wooden fence
- Upper body visible, facing the camera
- Holding ONLY ONE simple farming object with one hand: (basket of vegetables OR carrot OR corn OR watering can)
- The other hand is relaxed or resting naturally
- Clean hand pose, correct anatomy, five fingers per hand
- No multiple tools in one hand

FARMER OUTFIT:
- Farmer clothing: denim overalls or plaid shirt
- Straw hat or simple farmer hat
- Work gloves optional
- Natural, practical countryside outfit

FARM & AGRICULTURE PROPS (placed around, not in hands):
- Wooden crates filled with vegetables (carrots, lettuce, tomatoes)
- Fresh greens and herbs on the table
- Chickens, ducks, or hens nearby
- Eggs in baskets
- Hay bales, watering cans, garden tools resting in background
- Small tractor or barn elements in distance

BACKGROUND:
- Cozy farm or countryside setting
- Green fields, vegetable garden rows
- Wooden barn, fence, or farmhouse
- Blue sky, soft clouds, warm sunlight
- Background slightly blurred but objects readable

LIGHTING:
- Soft, warm cartoon lighting
- Gentle highlights, no harsh shadows

QUALITY:
- High-resolution cartoon illustration
- Clean lines, smooth colors
- No realism, no photo texture

9:16 vertical.
PackList.negative_prompt: photorealistic, realistic photo, hyperrealistic, skin texture, pores, photo lighting, anime, manga, dark gritty style, over-detail texture, identity loss, bad anatomy, extra fingers, cluttered hands, complex pose

PackList.title: Pilot
positive_prompts:
Create a highly stylized CARTOON caricature illustration based on the input photo, with a strong, obvious cartoon illustration style (NOT realistic).

STRICT IDENTITY PRESERVATION:
- Keep the same facial structure, face shape, eyes, nose, lips, skin tone, hairstyle, and facial hair (if any)
- The person must be instantly recognizable as the same individual
- Do NOT change gender, ethnicity, or age

FACIAL STYLE & EXPRESSION:
- Strong big-head cartoon caricature style
- Large expressive eyes, rounded cheeks
- Very bright confident smile OR playful wink
- Friendly, proud, professional pilot vibe
- Slight exaggeration of facial proportions while keeping accurate likeness

ART STYLE (VERY IMPORTANT – CARTOON EMPHASIS):
- Pure cartoon illustration, not photorealistic
- Thick, bold, clean outlines
- Simplified shapes, smooth rounded forms
- Vibrant, saturated colors
- Soft painterly shading, no realistic textures
- Semi-3D cartoon look, Pixar-like illustration style
- Clean, cheerful, family-friendly aesthetic

POSE & HANDS:
- Simple, readable pose
- The pilot is standing confidently, upper body visible
- Holding ONLY ONE simple object: (pilot cap OR flight checklist clipboard)

- Clean hand anatomy, five fingers, no complexity

PILOT OUTFIT:
- Cartoon-style pilot uniform
- White shirt with epaulets
- Pilot cap with exaggerated cartoon shape
- Tie optional
- Clean, sharp, simplified uniform details

AVIATION PROPS & BACKGROUND:
- Cartoon airplane parked behind the pilot
- Airport runway and terminal illustrated in cartoon style
- Control tower visible in the distance
- Luggage carts, airport signs, ground crew elements
- Blue sky, fluffy cartoon clouds
- Airplane windows, engines drawn with rounded cartoon shapes
- Everything illustrated, not realistic

LIGHTING:

- Soft highlights, no harsh shadows

QUALITY:

- Clean linework, smooth color fills
- No realism, no photo texture
